title: Duzzit Floor Wipes - Cleans & Shines | 100% Biodegradable - Made From Plant Fibres | For Ceramic, Wood and Linoleum Floors (16 Biodegradable Wipes, Lemon)
features: EASY CLEANING ON ALL FLOORS: These biodegradable floor wipes are ideal for daily use on ceramic, wood, or linoleum floors. From kitchen splashes to muddy footprints, they leave surfaces sparkling clean with minimal effort.
PERFECT FOR MOPS OR HAND USE: Simply attach a wipe to a standard flat mop or use by hand for targeted cleaning. Ideal for reaching tricky spots behind furniture or around table legs.
NO WATER NEEDED: Skip the bucket—these wipes work straight from the pack. Ideal for quick clean-ups in busy homes, especially after cooking, rainy walks or playtime messes.

EXTRA STRONG AND DURABLE: Each wipe is thick and tear-resistant, making them perfect for handling stubborn dirt and sticky spills. Tackle high-traffic areas like entryways and bathrooms with confidence.
HANDY RESEALABLE PACK: The 16-wipe pack features a resealable opening to keep wipes fresh and ready to use. A compact and practical addition to any set of home cleaning supplies.

NATURALLY POWERFUL FORMULA: Made with plant fibres, these biodegradable cleaning wipes deliver a deep clean while being kind to the planet. Perfect for those looking to reduce waste without compromising on cleanliness.

VERSATILE CLEANING SOLUTION: These wipes are suitable for a wide range of surfaces, making them an essential in your cleaning cupboard. Use as a kitchen cleaner, bathroom cleaner, or wooden floor cleaner.

SHINES WHILE IT CLEANS: Designed to clean and polish in one go, these multi-surface wipes restore shine to dull floors. Great for a quick spruce-up before guests arrive or after everyday wear and tear.
LEMON FRESH SCENT: Infused with a crisp lemon fragrance, these floor wipes leave behind a clean, uplifting scent. Use them in the kitchen, bathroom or hallway to refresh and brighten your space.

A MUST-HAVE FOR MODERN HOMES: Whether tackling everyday mess or giving floors a weekly refresh, these cleaning wipes make life easier. A reliable choice for those who value effective, eco-conscious cleaning products.
description: Product Description Make floor cleaning quick, easy, and eco-friendly with Duzzit Floor Wipes. Infused with a refreshing lemon scent, these extra strong cleaning wipes are designed to clean and shine ceramic, wood, and linoleum floors without the need for water. Made from 100% biodegradable plant fibres, they’re gentle on the planet but tough on everyday dirt, dust, and grime. Whether tackling muddy footprints in the hallway, kitchen spills, or daily bathroom cleaning, these wipes deliver sparkling results every time. The resealable pack keeps the 16 large wipes fresh and ready to use whenever you need them. Perfect for use with a rectangular mop or by hand, they offer a convenient alternative to traditional floor cleaners—ideal for busy households looking for fuss-free cleaning products. Suitable for use on most hard floor surfaces, including tiles, laminate, and wooden flooring, these wipes are a must-have in any home cleaning routine. Ingredients <5% Non Ionic Surfactants, Perfume, Limonene, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Linalyl Acetate, Methylisothiazolinone, Benzisothiazolinone. Directions * Peel back resealable label on the front of pack * Remove wipes as required * Place the long side of the wipe against the long side of the mop and fold over, pushing the excess into the grippers. * Wipe away any dirt and grime. * Carefully reseal pack after use to prevent wipes from drying out.
